listId.description: The unique identifier for the list.

listType.description: Whether the list is static (manually managed) or dynamic (filter-based).

objectTypeId.description: The object type the list contains (e.g., 0-1 for contacts).

processingStatus.description: The current processing status of the list.

createdAt.description: The date and time the list was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the list was last updated.

filterBranch.description: The filter definition for dynamic lists.

memberCount.description: The current number of members in the list.
